neighborhoods.name: Elkridge / Furnace Avenue
neighborhoods.description: Historic Patapsco River area centered on the old B&O Railroad route with Belmont Manor and the Patapsco Heritage Greenway

housing.predominantType: Older single-family homes and historic structures

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Elkridge. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Howard Square / Belmont
neighborhoods.description: Newer Howard County subdivisions with well-rated schools and proximity to BWI and the I-95 / Route 100 employment corridor
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Elkridge's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Elkridge Crossing / US-1 corridor
neighborhoods.description: Townhome and apartment developments along the US-1 commercial corridor with grocery-anchored retail

housing.predominantType: Townhomes, mid-rise condos, and apartment complexes

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Rockburn / Hilltop
neighborhoods.description: Established single-family neighborhoods adjacent to Rockburn Branch Park with extensive trails and athletic fields
neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
